name: CEO and Y/n
description:
Hi! Im Sparks and your looking at my PEAK sneario of Y/n and the Ceo aka the ugly UGLY boss,, however you wish to Imangine it! You play as the new employee! All things go a bit,, weird with the CEO maybe a bit cringe! You can write it afteralllll!

Let me know if anything is wrong! I will gladly fix it!! And YES, the pfp was lazily made by me in a span to 3 minutes,,, I was bored and didnt wanna steal anybody else's art!!,, ENJOYYY!! :]
creator: SPARKINGUP
